name: node-color-convert
title: node-color-convert
description:
Plain color conversion functions
Color-convert is a color conversion library for JavaScript and node.  It
converts all ways between rgb, hsl, hsv, hwb, cmyk, ansi, ansi16, hex strings,
and CSS keywords (will round to closest).
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-color-convert because Plain color conversion functions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-color-convert as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-color-convert with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-color-convert --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
